message:
WIP: Claude Code WASM support - help/version working, API calls blocked

Working:
- --help and --version commands execute successfully
- File system operations (read/write/append to ~/.claude/)
- Environment variables passed through (HOME, PATH, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
- .edgebox.json config for dirs, env, runtime (stack_size, heap_size)
- WebAssembly stub for tree-sitter (returns mock modules)
- Node modules via polyfills (http, https, fs, path, etc.)
- Increased stack to 8MB, heap to 64MB for large bytecode

Blocked:
- -p "prompt" hangs in js_std_loop waiting for async operation
- fetch polyfill set but not being called (SDK may use different path)
- Possible TTY/stdin blocking or timer deadlock

Changes:
- edgebox_wamr.zig: Load config from .edgebox.json (dirs, env, runtime)
- runtime.js: WebAssembly stub, forced fetch override, sync fetch
- node_polyfill.js: node-fetch module, http.request debug
- wasm_main_static.zig: fs_append function, debug output

files.patch:
@@ -3,17 +3,25 @@
   "description": "Claude Code CLI running in EdgeBox sandbox",
   "npm": "@anthropic-ai/claude-code",
   "dirs": [
+    ".",
     "/tmp",
+    "~",
     "~/.claude",
     "~/.config",
     "~/.local",
     "~/.cache",
     "/var/folders"
   ],
+  "runtime": {
+    "stack_size": 8388608,
+    "heap_size": 67108864
+  },
   "env": [
     "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY",
     "HOME",
-    "PATH"
+    "PATH",
+    "USER",
+    "TERM"
   ],
   "commands": {
     "git": ["clone", "status", "add", "commit", "push", "pull", "checkout", "branch", "log", "diff", "fetch", "merge", "rebase", "stash", "tag", "remote", "init"],
